global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with layered shapes and prominent text elements.
global.main_message: Promoting special fares for smarter travel options.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Several abstract shapes in lighter blue tones are scattered across the background, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Overlay shapes
elements.description: An overlay shape in a rectangular form is positioned centrally, creating a focal point.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A circular shape in a lighter shade of blue is placed towards the left side of the ad.

elements.label: Large rectangle
elements.description: A large rectangular shape is positioned centrally, serving as a container for text.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle in a lighter blue is located towards the bottom left, adding depth.

elements.label: Overlay rectangle
elements.description: Another rectangular overlay is placed slightly off-center, enhancing the layered effect.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The text 'Fly smarter' is prominently displayed in bold, white font, conveying the main message.

elements.label: Subheadline
elements.description: The text 'Special fares today' is presented below the headline in a smaller, white font.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The button 'Learn more' is centered at the bottom in a bold, white font, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'CloudRoute' is displayed at the top left in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the text 'SALE' is positioned at the top right, drawing attention.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, modern and minimalistic, promoting travel fares.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centrally positioned, with the logo at the top left and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Fly smarter, Special fares today, CloudRoute UGC, Learn more, SALE
